case_title: JONATHAN SALVADOR et al VS. QUIJADA CARLOS ANTONIO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALVADOR, JONATHAN HANDUKIC, EMILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTONIO, QUIJADA CARLOS $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,070.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SALVADOR, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIO, QUIJADA CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.00) SERVED MAY-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIO, QUIJADA CARLOS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIO, QUIJADA CARLOS
